title: Exclusive: Saraf & Partners loses two Banking & Finance Partners to CMS INDUSLAW
description: In a significant lateral move, Abir Lal Dey and Satyadarshi Kunal, both Partners in the Banking & Finance and Projects practice at Saraf & Partners, have resigned to join CMS INDUSLAW. The duo is taking a team with them, including Senior Associate Arnav Sinha and couple of associates.Saraf & Partners' founder Mohit Saraf confirmed the departures, saying,"We wish them all the very best."Dey, an alumnus of Symbiosis Law School, Pune, brings nearly two decades of experience to his new r
